problem id: 1e677e2c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) XOR SHL(6)

examples:
  11110100 -> 01001111
  00100111 -> 10110010
  01000011 -> 11110100
  01110011 -> 11110111
  11100011 -> 11111110
  00000100 -> 01000000
  10101111 -> 00111010
  00111101 -> 10010011

query: 11011000
predicted answer: 10001101
